message.content:
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam responseMessageBelowArrow true
skinparam ParticipantPadding 20
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor Client

participant "RegisterClientUI" as RegisterClientUI
participant "RegisterClientController" as RegisterClientController
participant "ApplicationPOT" as ApplicationPOT
participant "app\n:ApplicationPOT" as app
participant "clientService\n:ClientService" as clientService
participant "clientDB\n:ClientDB" as clientDB
participant "client\n:Client" as client
participant "user\n:User" as user
participant "EncryptPassword" as EncryptPassword
participant "Address" as Address
participant "CreditCard" as CreditCard
participant "EmailSender" as EmailSender
participant "DataHandler" as DataHandler

Client -> RegisterClientUI : 1 Engages the register feature /button
Client -> RegisterClientUI : 2 Asks for all the information required\nfor the register (i.e. name, nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,\nstreetName,doorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CVV)
Client -> RegisterClientUI : 3 Fills all the information required
RegisterClientUI -> Client : 4 Presents the data and asks for a confirmation
Client -> RegisterClientUI : 5 Confirms

RegisterClientUI -> RegisterClientController : 6 registerNewClient(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CVV)
RegisterClientController -> ApplicationPOT : 7 create()
ApplicationPOT -> app : create()
app -> clientService : 8 create()
clientService -> clientDB : create()
RegisterClientController -> app : 9 validateInput(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CVV)

alt if all the information given as input has a valid format
  RegisterClientController -> app : 10 newClient(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CVV)
  app -> client : 11 create(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CVV)

  client -> user : 12 create(email,password,nif,name)
  user -> EncryptPassword : 13 encryptPasswordMD5(password)
  client -> Address : 14 create(latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,doorNumber,postalCode,locality,country)
  client -> CreditCard : 15 create(creditCardNr,validityDate,CVV)

  RegisterClientController -> clientService : 16 registerNewClient(client)
  clientService -> clientDB : 17 addClientToDB(client)

  ref SD_CONNECTIONS
  end ref

  clientService -> EmailSender : 18 sendEmail(email,subject,body)
else if any information does not have a valid format
  RegisterClientUI -> Client : 19 Validates and informs about the success of the operation\nor informs the user that the operation\nwas not successful
  RegisterClientUI -> Client : 20
end
@enduml
